test-suite.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters
test-suite.description: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters

test-case.description: Should request token from correct endpoint
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters.Should request token from correct endpoint

test-case.description: Should return the access token
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters.Should return the access token

test-case.description: Should use client_credentials grant type
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters.Should use client_credentials grant type

test-case.description: Should request Graph API default scope
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via parameters.Should request Graph API default scope

test-suite.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via environment variables
test-suite.description: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via environment variables

test-case.description: Should use environment variables when parameters are empty
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are provided via environment variables.Should use environment variables when parameters are empty

test-case.description: Should throw when no credentials available
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When credentials are missing.Should throw when no credentials available

test-case.description: Should load credentials from .env file
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When .env file exists.Should load credentials from .env file

test-case.description: Should ignore comment lines in .env file
test-case.name: Get-GraphAccessToken.When .env file exists.Should ignore comment lines in .env file

test-case.description: Should call the correct Graph API endpoint
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making GET requests.Should call the correct Graph API endpoint

test-case.description: Should include Bearer token in Authorization header
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making GET requests.Should include Bearer token in Authorization header

test-case.description: Should default to GET method
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making GET requests.Should default to GET method

test-suite.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making POST requests with body
test-suite.description: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making POST requests with body

test-case.description: Should serialize body to JSON
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making POST requests with body.Should serialize body to JSON

test-case.description: Should set Content-Type to application/json
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When making POST requests with body.Should set Content-Type to application/json

test-case.description: Should automatically acquire token
test-case.name: Invoke-GraphRequest.When token is not provided.Should automatically acquire token

test-case.description: Should pass for valid YAML with all required fields
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Valid configuration files.Should pass for valid YAML with all required fields

test-case.description: Should accept multiple resources in a single file
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Valid configuration files.Should accept multiple resources in a single file

test-case.description: Should fail when resources array is missing
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when resources array is missing

test-case.description: Should fail when resourceType is missing
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when resourceType is missing

test-case.description: Should fail when resourceType has invalid format
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when resourceType has invalid format

test-case.description: Should fail when Id is not a valid GUID
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when Id is not a valid GUID

test-case.description: Should fail when State has invalid value
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when State has invalid value

test-case.description: Should fail when Ensure has invalid value
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Invalid configuration files.Should fail when Ensure has invalid value

test-case.description: Should warn but pass when unknown properties are present
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Unknown properties (permissive mode).Should warn but pass when unknown properties are present

test-case.description: Should fail in strict mode when unknown properties are present
test-case.name: Validate-Schema.ps1.Unknown properties (permissive mode).Should fail in strict mode when unknown properties are present

test-case.description: Should not make API calls in DryRun mode
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.DryRun mode.Should not make API calls in DryRun mode

failure.message: RuntimeException: No modules named 'Auth' are currently loaded.

test-case.description: Should output planned changes in DryRun mode
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.DryRun mode.Should output planned changes in DryRun mode

failure.message: RuntimeException: No modules named 'Auth' are currently loaded.

test-case.description: Should generate monitor name from tenant name
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Monitor naming conventions.Should generate monitor name from tenant name

test-case.description: Should sanitize special characters in monitor name
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Monitor naming conventions.Should sanitize special characters in monitor name

test-case.description: Should throw on authentication failure
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Error handling.Should throw on authentication failure

test-case.description: Should handle Graph API 429 (throttling) gracefully
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Error handling.Should handle Graph API 429 (throttling) gracefully

test-case.description: Should parse YAML files from workload subdirectories
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Configuration parsing.Should parse YAML files from workload subdirectories

test-case.description: Should handle empty config directory gracefully
test-case.name: Apply-Config.ps1.Configuration parsing.Should handle empty config directory gracefully

failure.message: PropertyNotFoundException: The property 'Count' cannot be found on this object. Verify that the property exists.
